annotations.content: We are against the horrible pipeline that will destroy 600 acres of wetland forest.
Demonstrators who refer to themselves as water protectors, chains of 55 gallon barrels...
Protestors were on Federal Lands owned by the US Army Corps...
... our lives and our water are not for sale!
Members of "no plaines pipeline" voiced their opposition to the Diamond Pipeline.
When an [...] could start, groups say it could start as early as [...] today.

What started in Standing Rock is now all over the world and the battle wages on. Protest camps are being built to fight pipelines and fracking across the globe. To stop the Diamond Pipeline in Oklahoma, the the Bayou Bridge Pipeline in Louisiana and in Florida.
tbd: independent media (We are change - Orlando)

In Australia they are locking the gates to gas drilling. In the Amazon indigenous people fight against oil pipelines. In the UK, in France, in Spain, Poland, in Germany, in Africa, in the South Pacific and in Asia... all over the world water protectors and land defenders are rising up. We are planet protectors now. Global protectors. We have awoken. We will wake up millions more.
Will you wake up? Will you join the millions of people that are taking their money out of banks that fund these pipelines in a massive divestment campaign?
We say defund the pipeline! Gonna take your kids and gonna give us..
Will you join the water protectors rising up on the streets across the nation? In New York, San Franscisco, Omaha, every city and every corner of the nation, big and small.

It was just a small group of kids who started this entire thing. And to see what great change we brought on as youth - that was amazing, that was powerful. It is not done what is happening here, the fight is not over and it does not intent to be soon.

This movement has always been of the people. Not of any government. It was always we the people that were always on the ground, in the frontlines. It was always the people that went, common people. So the people have to continue that. So although our camp has burned it has brung up thousands of places across the globe, inspiring growth, as the wildfires across the prairies.

The spirit of our people can not be conquered. Because we are the spirit of the water and earth itself. Our ancestors are calling on us. We have the chance to resist and to change America, the globe, forever. So I'll ask you once again: Will you join us?
Water is life! Water is life! Water is life! Water is life!
